ddls:
CREATE TABLE "order_versions" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order at the time of update */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was updated */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "version")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer company */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_title" TEXT /* Title of the primary contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the customer */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the employee */,
  "title_of_courtesy" TEXT /* Formal title of courtesy */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the employee */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the employee */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the employee */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the employee */,
  "home_phone" TEXT /* Home phone number of the employee */,
  "extension" TEXT /* Extension of the employee's office phone */,
  "photo" TEXT /* Photo of the employee */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the employee */,
  "reports_to" INTEGER /* ID of the manager to whom the employee reports */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_providers" (
  "shipping_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipping provider was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipping provider was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_methods" (
  "shipping_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping method */,
  "shipping_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping method */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the shipping method */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated delivery time of the shipping method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipping method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipping method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_methods_shipping_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_provider_id") REFERENCES shipping_providers ("shipping_provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)
